seoTitle: Ferndale vs Finucane — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ferndale and Finucane. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ferndale and Finucane.
heading: Ferndale vs Finucane — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ferndale, Western Australia and Finucane, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferndale and Finucane have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Ferndale or Finucane safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ferndale has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Finucane scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ferndale scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Finucane scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ferndale or Finucane?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferndale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
